title: Better Vanilla Terrain
description: This is a lightly modified Minecraft datapack based on the original terrain, bringing some new changes to the vanilla game.
body:
This is a lightly modified Minecraft datapack based on the original terrain, bringing some new changes to the vanilla game.

# 💡Features:
- A smoother surface
- Biome overdrawing is smoother
- Minor River Adjustment
